    "About": [
      "It is about a political philosophy and a variety of conservatism that places emphasis on conserving the traditional moral values of the society, typically sourced from a religion.",
      "It is about preserving traditional social structures over social pluralism.",
      "It is about organizing in favor of duty, traditional values, and social institutions, such as traditional family structures, gender roles, sexual relations, national patriotism, and religious traditions.",

      "It is about valuing the rights of religious institutions to participate in the public sphere.",
      "It is about supporting government-religious endorsement and opposing state atheism, and in some cases opposing secularism.",
      "It is about being an outgrowth of traditionalist conservatism.",
      "It is about focusing largely on moralism, as opposed to the broader philosophical considerations of traditional conservatism."

  "japanese": {
    "About": [
      "それは、主に宗教に由来する社会の伝統的な道徳的価値観を維持することを重視する政治哲学および保守主義の一形態についてです。",
      "それは、社会的多元主義よりも伝統的な社会構造を維持することを目指しています。",
      "それは、義務、伝統的価値観、および伝統的な家族構造、性別役割、性的関係、国家愛国心、宗教的伝統などの社会制度を支持するために組織化することについてです。",
      "それは、社会の変化に懐疑的であり、代わりに社会問題に関する現状維持を支持する傾向があることについてです。",
      "それは、宗教機関が公的領域に参加する権利を尊重することについてです。",
      "それは、政府と宗教の支持を支持し、国家無神論に反対し、場合によっては世俗主義に反対することについてです。",
      "それは、伝統主義的保守主義から大きく発展したものであることについてです。",
      "それは、伝統的保守主義の広範な哲学的考慮事項とは対照的に、主に道徳主義に焦点を当てていることについてです。"
    ],

About: It is about a political philosophy and a variety of conservatism that places emphasis on conserving the traditional moral values of the society, typically sourced from a religion.
It is about preserving traditional social structures over social pluralism.

It is about organizing in favor of duty, traditional values, and social institutions, such as traditional family structures, gender roles, sexual relations, national patriotism, and religious traditions.
It is about being skeptical of social change, instead tending to support the status quo concerning social issues.
It is about valuing the rights of religious institutions to participate in the public sphere.
It is about supporting government-religious endorsement and opposing state atheism, and in some cases opposing secularism.
It is about being an outgrowth of traditionalist conservatism.
It is about focusing largely on moralism, as opposed to the broader philosophical considerations of traditional conservatism.

It affects gender roles.
It affects sexual relations.

It is characterized by a focus on moralism.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by traditionalist conservatism.
It was influenced by religion.
It was influenced by Confucian traditions and modernism in China.
It was influenced by New Confucianism in China.
It was influenced by conservative nationalism in China.
It was influenced by Islamic law (Shariah) in the Islamic world.
It was influenced by the Arab spring in the Arab world.
It was influenced by Hindutva movement in India.
It was influenced by nativism in India.
It was influenced by Hinduism as a national identity in India.
IsA: It is a variety of conservatism.
It is a conservative era in China under Xi Jinping.
KnownAs: It is known as "Conservative Era" in China under Xi Jinping.
KnownFor: It is known for placing emphasis on conserving traditional moral values.
It is known for preserving traditional social structures.
It is known for supporting duty, traditional values, and social institutions.
It is known for being skeptical of social change.
It is known for valuing the rights of religious institutions.
It is known for supporting government-religious endorsement.
It is known for opposing state atheism.
It is known for its focus on moralism.

UsedTo: It is used to preserve traditional social structures.
It is used to organize in favor of duty, traditional values, and social institutions.
It is used to support the status quo concerning social issues.
It is used to support government-religious endorsement.

It is used to institutionalize a Uniform Civil Code in India.

About: それは、主に宗教に由来する社会の伝統的な道徳的価値観を維持することを重視する政治哲学および保守主義の一形態についてです。
それは、社会的多元主義よりも伝統的な社会構造を維持することを目指しています。
それは、義務、伝統的価値観、および伝統的な家族構造、性別役割、性的関係、国家愛国心、宗教的伝統などの社会制度を支持するために組織化することについてです。
それは、社会の変化に懐疑的であり、代わりに社会問題に関する現状維持を支持する傾向があることについてです。
それは、宗教機関が公的領域に参加する権利を尊重することについてです。
それは、政府と宗教の支持を支持し、国家無神論に反対し、場合によっては世俗主義に反対することについてです。
それは、伝統主義的保守主義から大きく発展したものであることについてです。
それは、伝統的保守主義の広範な哲学的考慮事項とは対照的に、主に道徳主義に焦点を当てていることについてです。
